name: Memory with mdvdb
description: mdvdb-backed long-term memory with hybrid search, time decay, and link boosting

provider.description: Embedding provider: openai, ollama, or custom

apiKey.description: API key for OpenAI or custom provider. Supports ${ENV_VAR} syntax.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for custom embedding endpoint

ignorePatterns.description: File patterns to exclude from indexing. OpenClaw workspace files (AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, etc.) are excluded by default.

autoCapture.description: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.description: Automatically recall relevant memories before agent starts

captureMaxChars.description: Maximum character length for auto-captured memories

decay.description: Enable time decay in search results

boostLinks.description: Boost results with links to other memories

minScore.description: Minimum similarity score for search results

decayHalfLife.description: Half-life in days for time decay

decayInclude.description: Only apply time decay to files matching these glob patterns (default: time-log memory files only)

decayExclude.description: Exclude files matching these glob patterns from time decay

memoryDir.label: Memory Directory
memoryDir.help: Directory where memory files are stored as Markdown

mdvdbBin.label: mdvdb Binary Path
mdvdbBin.help: Path to the mdvdb CLI binary (must be installed separately)

embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: Embedding provider: openai, ollama, or custom (default: openai)

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Model name (e.g. text-embedding-3-small for OpenAI, nomic-embed-text for Ollama)

embedding.apiKey.label: API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI or custom provider

embedding.baseUrl.label: Custom Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: Base URL for custom embedding endpoint

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into agent context

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Characters
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum character length for auto-captured memories (100-10000)

searchDefaults.mode.label: Search Mode
searchDefaults.mode.help: Default search mode: hybrid (semantic + BM25), semantic only, or lexical only

searchDefaults.decay.label: Time Decay
searchDefaults.decay.help: Reduce relevance of older memories in search results

searchDefaults.boostLinks.label: Boost Links
searchDefaults.boostLinks.help: Boost results that link to other memories

searchDefaults.limit.label: Result Limit
searchDefaults.limit.help: Default number of search results to return

searchDefaults.decayHalfLife.label: Decay Half-Life (days)
searchDefaults.decayHalfLife.help: Number of days for memory relevance to halve (uses mdvdb config if unset)

searchDefaults.decayInclude.label: Decay Include Patterns
searchDefaults.decayInclude.help: Only apply time decay to files matching these patterns (default: time-log memory files only)

searchDefaults.decayExclude.label: Decay Exclude Patterns
searchDefaults.decayExclude.help: Exclude files matching these patterns from time decay
